reviews.comment:
Un lugar con todos los servicios para los socios del ACA y para comer, trabajar con la computadora un rato. El restaurant es un poco básico en infraestructura, pero funciona bien.

(Translated by Google)
A place with all the amenities for ACA members, where you can eat and work on your computer for a while. The restaurant is a bit basic in terms of facilities, but it works well.

reviews.comment:
Atencion rapida para carga de nafta salvo algunos dias donde se debe esperar 2 o 3 autos. Buen lugar de encuentro en la cafeteria. En horario normal ayuda en servicio tecnico. Si sos socio del ACA tenes descuentos del 10% en cafeteria y descuento en combustble

(Translated by Google)
Fast service for fueling, except on some days when you may have to wait for two or three cars. A good meeting place in the cafeteria. During regular business hours, they help with technical service. If you're an ACA member, you get a 10% discount in the cafeteria and a discount on fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRMDZMajRBRRAB
